The camera slowly pulls back, revealing multiple rows of teacups in the background and a small pink tag on the teapot lid. [6-12] The text vanishes, cutting to a kitchen counter where a person in a pink shirt and blue apron stands behind the floral teapot. Foreground items include a white digital timer, two silver strainers, and a blue tin labeled "Whittard ENGLISH ROSE LEAF TEA." White and steel kettles sit in the background against tiled walls. The person briefly touches the teapot lid before standing still as the scene remains static. [18-26] A person wearing a pink shirt and blue apron stands still behind a counter. On the countertop, a white floral teapot, a blue tin reading "Whittard ENGLISH ROSE LEAF TEA," two silver strainers, and a white timer remain undisturbed. In the background, a white kettle and a steel kettle sit against a tiled wall. The entire scene is static with no movement or interaction occurring during this

[58-62] A person in a pink shirt and blue apron lifts the white lid from a floral teapot and sets it on the counter near a white timer, while inserting a pink scoop into the pot. A blue tin labeled "Whittard ENGLISH ROSE" and two silver spoons remain stationary. [62-64] The scene cuts to a stainless steel thermos with a black lid and handle against a tiled wall. [64-66] The view returns to the counter where the white lid rests near the timer and the pink scoop remains inside the open teapot, with the blue tin and spoons undisturbed.

From 66-70s, a person in a pink shirt and blue apron holds a floral teapot, reaching inside to adjust a pink scoop while the white lid rests nearby. At 70-72s, they remove the pink plastic infuser, setting it upright on the counter left of the pot. Finally, from 72-74s, the person pours water from a white electric kettle into the teapot. Throughout, a blue tin labeled "Whittard ENGLISH ROSE BLACK TEA," two silver spoons, and a white timer remain undisturbed in the foreground.

[74-78] After stopping pouring from a white kettle and returning it to its base, the person reaches their right hand into a floral teapot on the counter. A pink infuser, a blue tin labeled "Whittard ENGLISH ROSE BLACK TEA", and silver spoons sit nearby. [78-84] The scene transitions to a stainless steel sink with a curved chrome faucet. The person holds the floral teapot over the basin, gripping the handle and body, tilting it to drain a stream of clear water from the spout into the drain.

[84-92] A person in a pink shirt holds a white floral teapot over a stainless steel sink, tilting it to drain water. A stream flows from the spout into the basin, with a curved chrome faucet visible on the left against a blurred kitchen background. The person maintains their grip on the teapot as the steady stream pours into the drain. Subsequently, the water stream diminishes and stops as the teapot is tilted back to an upright position. The flow ceases completely, finishing the draining process while the faucet stands prominently on the left.

recent_thinks: [12-14] The scene remains static as the person in the pink shirt and blue apron stands behind the counter. The floral teapot, blue tea tin, silver strainers, and white timer remain stationary on the countertop. White and silver kettles are visible in the background against the tiled wall, with no significant movement occurring.

[46-48] The person in the pink shirt and blue apron lifts their left hand from the counter. They point a finger towards the white digital timer on the left side of the surface. The floral teapot, blue tea tin, and silver strainers remain stationary in the center and right foreground.

[56-58] The person shifts their right hand from resting on the blue tea tin to hovering directly over the two silver measuring spoons in the center. The left hand remains stationary on the counter near the white timer, and the floral teapot and background kettles are unchanged.

[92-94] The person in the pink shirt and blue apron stands at the counter holding the white floral teapot. The white lid rests on the surface to the left near the digital timer. The blue tea tin and silver spoons sit in the foreground while the teapot is held centrally above the counter.

queries.question: How many piles of loose leaf tea are visible on the countertop?

samples.output: <think>The person holds the blue tea tin in their left hand while using a silver spoon in their right hand to scoop loose dark tea leaves. They lift the spoon filled with leaves from the tin. The floral teapot with a pink infuser sits on the counter nearby, along with a white timer and silver spoons.</think><answer></answer>

The camera slowly pulls back, revealing multiple rows of teacups in the background and a small pink tag on the teapot lid. [6-12] The text vanishes, cutting to a kitchen counter where a person in a pink shirt and blue apron stands behind the floral teapot. Foreground items include a white digital timer, two silver strainers, and a blue tin labeled "Whittard ENGLISH ROSE LEAF TEA." White and steel kettles sit in the background against tiled walls. The person briefly touches the teapot lid before standing still as the scene remains static. [18-26] A person wearing a pink shirt and blue apron stands still behind a counter. On the countertop, a white floral teapot, a blue tin reading "Whittard ENGLISH ROSE LEAF TEA," two silver strainers, and a white timer remain undisturbed. In the background, a white kettle and a steel kettle sit against a tiled wall. The entire scene is static with no movement or interaction occurring during this

[92-96] A person in a pink shirt and blue apron stands at a counter holding a white floral teapot and a blue tea tin. They use a silver spoon to scoop dark loose tea leaves from the tin while a white timer and lid rest nearby. [96-100] The person dumps the spoonful of leaves onto the counter, forming a pile. A close-up reveals dark leaves mixed with orange petals. They then scoop more leaves from the blue tin, creating a second pile near the first on the speckled surface.

[102-110] A person in a pink shirt and blue apron stands at a counter with a floral teapot, white timer, silver spoon rest, and white electric kettle. A third distinct pile of dark loose tea leaves appears on the surface next to two existing piles. The person holds a blue tin and uses a silver spoon to scoop leaves. They lift the spoon filled with tea and deposit it into a pink infuser inside the teapot. The person then inserts the spoon back into the blue tin opening, manipulating it within the container while the appliances remain stationary.

[110-116] A person in a pink shirt and blue apron holds a blue tin labeled "WHITTARD ENGLISH ROSE" while using a silver spoon to scoop dark loose tea leaves, lifting the spoon full of tea. Three distinct piles of tea sit on the counter near a floral teapot containing a pink infuser and a white electric kettle. [116-118] A left hand adorned with a gold bracelet presses buttons on a white digital timer resting on the counter, then moves leftward toward a paper chart with blue squares. The three piles of tea and the floral teapot remain stationary on the surface nearby.

[118-122] A white digital timer rests on a speckled surface, displaying "04" minutes and "00" seconds before the digits change to show "00" minutes and "02" seconds remaining. [122-124] The timer continues counting down until the display reads "00:00", signaling the end of the period. [124-126] The camera pulls back to reveal a person in a pink shirt and blue apron behind a floral teapot; with the timer showing zero nearby, the person reaches inside the teapot to grasp the pink infuser.

recent_thinks: [12-14] The scene remains static as the person in the pink shirt and blue apron stands behind the counter. The floral teapot, blue tea tin, silver strainers, and white timer remain stationary on the countertop. White and silver kettles are visible in the background against the tiled wall, with no significant movement occurring.

[46-48] The person in the pink shirt and blue apron lifts their left hand from the counter. They point a finger towards the white digital timer on the left side of the surface. The floral teapot, blue tea tin, and silver strainers remain stationary in the center and right foreground.

[56-58] The person shifts their right hand from resting on the blue tea tin to hovering directly over the two silver measuring spoons in the center. The left hand remains stationary on the counter near the white timer, and the floral teapot and background kettles are unchanged.

[100-102] The scene cuts from a close-up of tea leaves to a medium shot. The person holds the blue tin and scoops dark leaves with a silver spoon. Two piles of loose tea sit on the counter near the white timer and floral teapot.

[126-128] The person in the pink shirt and blue apron lifts the pink infuser out of the floral teapot using their right hand. Their left hand steadies the teapot on the counter. The white timer displays zero, and three piles of dark tea leaves remain scattered on the surface near the silver spoon.

[128-130] The person places the pink infuser on the counter to the left of the floral teapot. They then hold the teapot with both hands, keeping it centered on the surface. The white timer displays zero nearby, while the three piles of dark tea leaves remain undisturbed on the counter.

queries.question: Which of the following words appears on the blue tea tin? A. Crowd B. Whittard C. Tutorial D. Annie's

answers.text: B

samples.output: <think>A person wearing a pink shirt and blue apron holds the floral teapot with their right hand on the handle. Their left hand hovers near the top left rim with fingers extended. The pink infuser sits on the counter to the left, while the white timer, silver spoon, and tea piles remain undisturbed on the surface.</think><answer></answer>
